announcements.details: Read the commentary on the readings for Pentecost Sunday.
announcements.title: Commentary: Pentecost Sunday

announcements.details: There will be TWO masses on Sunday, 31st May, 2026. Offertory will be led by the St. Theresa of the Child Jesus Society and Saturday borns. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: Solemnity of the Most Holy Trinity

announcements.details: Kindly note that there is In His Presence on Sunday, 31st May at 6pm. Come with your written intentions and articles of faith to be blessed.
announcements.title: In His Presence

announcements.details: Catechesis for the Sacraments is ongoing. Baptism and First Communion classes for children aged 10 and above are held on Saturdays at 3:00pm. Confirmation classes are for those aged 15 and above, while adult classes take place on Sundays after the first Mass. Interested persons should register with the catechists, at the parish office.
announcements.title: Chatechism Classes

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

masses.subtitle: First Mass at 7:00am, Second Mass at 9:30am

masses.subtitle: Monday at 7am, Wednesday to Friday at 6am
